lucidBlocksBeginnerGuide.title: All Star Tower Defense X Codes
lucidBlocksBeginnerGuide.intro: Redeem active All Star Tower Defense X codes for Gems, Trait Burners, Bounded Cubes, Stat Dice, and extra progression resources before you summon or reroll.

steps.title: All Star Tower Defense X Code: LIMITEDTIMECODEX
steps.description: Reward bundle: 2,500 Gems, 85 Trait Burners, and 20 Bounded Cubes. Best for high-value summons and trait rerolls.

steps.title: All Star Tower Defense X Code: THANKYOUFORPLAYINGLOVE
steps.description: Reward bundle: 2,500 Gems, 85 Trait Burners, and 20 Bounded Cubes. Best for summon and reroll preparation.

steps.title: All Star Tower Defense X Code: UPDATE9
steps.description: Reward bundle: 2,500 Gems, 85 Trait Burners, and 20 Bounded Cubes. Best for update-week progression.

steps.title: All Star Tower Defense X Code: SPRINGOWEENRELEASED
steps.description: Reward bundle: 2,500 Gems, 85 Trait Burners, and 20 Bounded Cubes. Best for event-cycle resource stock.

steps.title: All Star Tower Defense X Code: NEWUPDATESTUFF
steps.description: Reward bundle: 1,500 Gems, 50 Trait Burners, and 20 Bounded Cubes. Best for extra summon sessions.

steps.title: All Star Tower Defense X Code: SORRY4BREAK
steps.description: Reward bundle: 2,000 Gems, 150 Trait Burners, and 50 Bounded Cubes. Best for aggressive trait rerolling.

steps.title: All Star Tower Defense X Code: UPDATE7ORISIT8
steps.description: Reward bundle: 2,000 Gems, 100 Trait Burners, and 40 Bounded Cubes. Best for roster rebuilding.

steps.title: All Star Tower Defense X Code: THANKYOUFOR570KLIKES
steps.description: Reward bundle: 3,000 Gems, 40 Trait Burners, 20 Stat Dice, 3 Bounded Cubes, and 1 Roka Fruit. Requirement: level 8+.

quickTips: Open All Star Tower Defense X, tap the bird icon, paste the code, and press Redeem.
Redeem all active codes before pulling on banners so pity and resources line up.
If a code fails, check spelling and level requirements, then retry in a new lobby.
Use large bundles first when you plan to summon and reroll in the same session.

cards.name: All Star Tower Defense X All Star Tier

cards.name: All Star Tower Defense X Meta Overall Tier
cards.description: Strong universal units for multi-mode progression: Maniac, Blood Queen, Tomi, Meduka, Paper Beauty, Shirtless Devil, and Etri.

cards.name: All Star Tower Defense X Early Game Tier
cards.description: Fast-start units that stabilize early clears: Shirtless Devil, Zaruto (Beast Cloak II), Crow, Frost Moon, and Maniac.

cards.name: All Star Tower Defense X Support Tier

lucidBlocksStorageAndInventory.title: All Star Tower Defense X Beginner Guide
lucidBlocksStorageAndInventory.intro: Follow this All Star Tower Defense X beginner flow to start with free resources, build a summon-ready roster, and progress through Story and farming modes efficiently.

solutions.name: All Star Tower Defense X Step 1: Enter the Official Roblox Experience
solutions.description: Start inside All Star Tower Defense X and learn placement, upgrades, and wave pacing before spending premium resources.

solutions.name: All Star Tower Defense X Step 2: Redeem Codes Before Summoning
solutions.description: Claim active codes first so your first banner cycle has enough Gems, Trait Burners, and Stat Dice.

solutions.name: All Star Tower Defense X Step 3: Summon and Build Core Slots
solutions.description: Use banner refresh windows and pity progress to secure dependable 5 Star and support options early.

solutions.name: All Star Tower Defense X Step 4: Push Story Mode and Farm
solutions.description: Use Story clears for stable rewards, then expand into Infinite, Trials, and Portal farming routes.

managementTips: Track All Star Tower Defense X banner refresh timing before committing Gems.
Mix damage, support, and economy units instead of stacking one role.
Use traits and hidden potential on your highest-value core units first.
Keep one farming team and one push team for different mode goals.

lucidBlocksQualiaAndBaseBuilding.title: All Star Tower Defense X Summon Banner
lucidBlocksQualiaAndBaseBuilding.intro: Summoning is the main way to obtain most units in All Star Tower Defense X. Use Banner X and Banner Y timing, rates, and pity math to plan every Gem session.

cards.name: All Star Tower Defense X Banner Refresh Schedule
cards.description: Banner X refreshes at XX:00 and Banner Y refreshes at XX:30 every hour, giving two pull windows each cycle.

cards.name: All Star Tower Defense X Banner Rates
cards.description: Visible pool uses 1 Five-Star (1%), 2 Four-Stars (8%), and 3 Three-Stars (27%), while Unbound remains a hidden 0.01% chase.

cards.name: All Star Tower Defense X Summon Costs
cards.description: Single summons cost 50 Gems, while 10x costs 450 Gems and lowers full 5-Star pity to 4,500 Gems.

cards.name: All Star Tower Defense X Pity and Unbound Targets
cards.description: 5-Star pity triggers at 100 summons and Unbound pity at 2,000 summons, with Spider Boss on Banner X and Michishibo on Banner Y.

highlights: Check All Star Tower Defense X Banner X and Banner Y before every summon session
Treat All Star Tower Defense X Unbound pulls as long-term pity goals, not short-term odds
Use All Star Tower Defense X 10x summons to save Gems during full pity cycles
Match All Star Tower Defense X featured units to your current team gaps before spending

lucidBlocksWorldRegions.title: All Star Tower Defense X Traits
lucidBlocksWorldRegions.intro: Traits can change a unit role in All Star Tower Defense X by improving damage, range, speed, economy, durability, placement count, and special effects.

regions.name: All Star Tower Defense X Core Damage Traits
regions.description: Zenkai, Dexterity, Sharpshooter, and Tempest improve carry output and are strong keeps when your DPS units already have stable placement and uptime.

regions.name: All Star Tower Defense X Utility and Economy Traits
regions.description: Midas, Companion, Tank, and Perception improve farming consistency, placement flexibility, or frontline stability for long maps.

regions.name: All Star Tower Defense X Rare Trait Pity
regions.description: Bloodlust (500 pity), Corrupted (450 pity), Genesis (650 pity), and All Star (1000 pity) are build-defining outcomes worth planned reroll budgets.

regions.name: All Star Tower Defense X Reroll Order
regions.description: Reroll your main carry first, then shield-break or support units, and avoid burning Trait Burners on temporary roster slots.

lucidBlocksCreaturesAndEnemies.title: All Star Tower Defense X Gems Guide
lucidBlocksCreaturesAndEnemies.intro: Gems are the core summon currency in All Star Tower Defense X. Start with one-time rewards, then move into repeatable Story, Infinite, and Portal farming loops.

creatures.name: All Star Tower Defense X Code Redemption Route
creatures.description: Codes like THANKYOUFOR570KLIKES, DELAYYY5, and SORRY4BREAK give fast Gems plus Trait Burners, Stat Dice, and Bounded Cubes.

creatures.name: All Star Tower Defense X Story Casual and Hard Clears
creatures.description: Casual first clears give 60 Gems per Arc and Hard first clears give 70, while both routes unlock stronger maps and better farm options.

creatures.name: All Star Tower Defense X Infinite Wave Milestones
creatures.description: Infinite Gem rewards scale by wave checkpoints, from around 14-15 at wave 10 up to about 99 by wave 50 for stable repeat income.

creatures.name: All Star Tower Defense X Classic and Void Bag Value
creatures.description: Classic Infinite improves Gem efficiency for strong base teams, and Void Bags add Trait Burners, Stat Dice, Bounded Cubes, and Summon Tickets.

creatures.name: All Star Tower Defense X Portal and Pity Planning
creatures.description: Portals cost 250 Gems and can return 235 Gems per clear plus special drops, so combine portal runs with 10x summon pity planning.

lucidBlocksMobilityGear.title: All Star Tower Defense X Story Mode
lucidBlocksMobilityGear.intro: Story Mode is the core progression route in All Star Tower Defense X. Each area has 6 Arcs with 15 waves, boss pressure, and first-clear rewards.

items.name: All Star Tower Defense X Story System Overview
items.description: Each Story area has 6 Arcs with 15 waves each, and Arc clears unlock the next area plus Endless access for that region.

items.name: All Star Tower Defense X Innovation to Voldstandig
items.description: Innovation Island (Blue, weak to Green) and City of Voldstandig (Purple, weak to Orange) establish early progression and elemental planning.

items.name: All Star Tower Defense X Future City and Hidden Storm
items.description: Future City (Orange, weak to Red) and Hidden Storm Village (Green, weak to Purple) add harder boss mechanics and tighter team checks.

items.name: All Star Tower Defense X Giant Island and City of York
items.description: Giant Island (Red, weak to Blue) and City of York (Green, weak to Purple) demand burst damage for complex boss behavior and final-wave pressure.

items.name: All Star Tower Defense X Story Reward Planning
items.description: Casual and Hard clears provide Gems, Gold, food, map drops, and mount or VFX rewards, so route clears by both progression and farm value.

unlockMilestones: All Star Tower Defense X Story Arc first-clear Gem routing
All Star Tower Defense X Casual-to-Hard transition timing
All Star Tower Defense X element counter team preparation
All Star Tower Defense X Arc 6 boss mechanic planning

lucidBlocksFarmingAndGrowth.title: All Star Tower Defense X Infinite Mode Wave Rewards and HP Scaling
lucidBlocksFarmingAndGrowth.subtitle: Track All Star Tower Defense X Infinite Mode milestones, enemy HP spikes, multiplayer scaling, and Gem reward checkpoints to decide when to reset.
lucidBlocksFarmingAndGrowth.intro: In All Star Tower Defense X, Infinite Mode sends endless enemy waves until base HP is depleted. Regular mode keeps Traits, Hidden Potential, and stats active, while Classic disables those bonuses for a slight Gem-gain increase. Enemy HP scales by player count at +0.9x HP per extra player, so 2P to 4P runs become much heavier than solo clears.

items.note: Starting wave and baseline HP check.
Early farming checkpoint with low HP pressure.
Enemy HP starts climbing much faster here.
High-effort checkpoint where team scaling is very visible.
Major HP wall before post-45 slowdown.
Scaling slows down after the Wave 45 spike.
Highest listed Gem checkpoint in the chart.

highlights: All Star Tower Defense X Void Bags can drop EXP items, Trait Burners, Stat Dice, Bounded Cubes, Summon Tickets, and Kujo.
All Star Tower Defense X Void Bag inventory cap is 199, so clear or open bags regularly during long sessions.
All Star Tower Defense X 2P to 4P scaling is steep, so choose wave targets by reward efficiency, not only max-wave ambition.

lucidBlocksBestEarlyUnlocks.title: All Star Tower Defense X Trials Rewards, Strategist Mode, Coins, and Clear Notes
lucidBlocksBestEarlyUnlocks.subtitle: Review All Star Tower Defense X Trials by level requirement, reward pool, element, coin drops, and boss mechanics across Regular and Strategist.
lucidBlocksBestEarlyUnlocks.intro: All Star Tower Defense X Trials unlock at level gates and reward Gold, Gems, trial-specific coins, materials, and unit drops. Regular clears usually have 5% unit chances, while Strategist usually has 25% unit chances and better coin drops, but removes unit Hidden Potential, Traits, and Stats.

items.title: All Star Tower Defense X In-Game Trial Cards
items.summary: Cards appear at the beginning of waves 4, 8, and 12 so players can trade safety for higher reward bonuses.
details: Green cards grant beneficial effects such as speed, damage, or range and add 0% reward bonus.
Blue cards strengthen enemies with effects such as speed, HP, or shields and add 20% reward bonus.
Red cards apply harsher negatives, such as removing all Traits, and add 40% reward bonus.
Reward bonuses stack after a successful clear and increase unit drop chance.

items.title: All Star Tower Defense X Trial Shop and Trial Coins
items.summary: Trial Coins are spent at the Trial Shop beside the yellow Trials entrance, and each Trial uses a different coin type.
details: Regular clears usually drop 5-8 trial coins; Strategist clears usually drop 10-14.
Shops include Star Scrolls, Roka Fruit, Doma Fruit, Luck Boosters, Star Statue (Gold), Trait Burners, Stat Dice, Bounded Cubes, and Summon Tickets.
Star Scrolls are consumed from inventory to automatically obtain the linked character.
Trial 1 uses Etri Coins and Trial 2 uses Magma Coins.

items.title: All Star Tower Defense X Trial 1
items.summary: Trial 1 rewards Etri progression and introduces stun-heavy pressure.
details: Bring a shield breaker; Airren's Titan Form is a recommended option.
Boss stuns can disrupt carries, so place non-DPS units to absorb stuns away from core damage.
On the final wave, two invincible side-lane bosses spawn; focus the middle lane boss.

items.title: All Star Tower Defense X Trial 2
items.summary: Trial 2 mirrors Trial 1 reward structure but shifts to Magma Coin routing.
items.regularRewards: Magma Marine (5%), Spade Hat (50%), 5-8 Magma Coins
items.strategistRewards: Magma Marine (25%), Spade Hat (100%), 10-14 Magma Coins
details: Bring a shield breaker because Wave 5 enemies regenerate shields.
Invaders and bosses can stun frequently, so prioritize deleting them quickly.
Rewards track Trial 1 patterns but use Magma Coins.

items.title: All Star Tower Defense X Trial 3 - Arc 1
items.summary: Arc 1 is a timed pressure trial with heavy shield checks.
details: Wave 11 boss has 100 shields, making shield break mandatory.
After Wave 15 begins, players have 5 minutes to clear all enemies or fail.
Frequent stuns reduce uptime, and the final boss spawns inside a dome where units cannot be placed.

items.title: All Star Tower Defense X Trial 3 - Arc 2
items.summary: Arc 2 emphasizes lane distribution and boss control timing.
items.regularRewards: Supreme Leader (5%), Supreme Helmet (50%), 5-8 Supreme Coins
items.strategistRewards: Supreme Leader (25%), Supreme Helmet (100%), 10-14 Supreme Coins
items.bossHp: 1,750,000 middle boss; 650,000 left and right bosses
details: Split unit coverage across three lanes, or assign one player to each lane in team runs.
Bosses appear on Waves 5, 10, and 15, with a very fast Wave 10 boss.
The final boss can delete towers while easier side-path bosses also appear.

items.title: All Star Tower Defense X Trial 3 - Arc 3
items.summary: Arc 3 combines timed routing with double-boss wave pressure.
items.regularRewards: Supreme Leader (5%), Freezer (20%), Freezer Mask (50%), 5-8 Supreme Coins
items.strategistRewards: Supreme Leader (25%), Freezer (35%), Freezer Mask (100%), 10-14 Supreme Coins
details: Map has three paths with a 16-minute clear timer.
Supreme Leader appears on Wave 6, Freezer on Wave 11, and both on Wave 15.
On Wave 15, Supreme Leader is invincible for a while, so focus Freezer first.

items.title: All Star Tower Defense X Trial 4 - Arc 1
items.summary: Neutral element means this trial favors stable DPS and control more than element counters.
items.regularRewards: Flaming Tiger (5%), Flame Cape (50%), 5-8 Flame Coins
items.strategistRewards: Flaming Tiger (25%), Flame Cape (100%), 10-14 Flame Coins
details: Neutral matchups reduce the value of elemental counter damage.
Prioritize raw DPS, clean path coverage, and reliable boss control.

items.title: All Star Tower Defense X Trial 5 - Arc 1
items.summary: Trial 5 is a key progression route for Crow and Limiter Switch targets.
items.regularRewards: Crow (5%), Assistant Glasses (50%), 5-8 Reanimation Coins, Limiter Switch (50%)
items.strategistRewards: Crow (25%), Assistant Glasses (100%), 10-14 Reanimation Coins, Limiter Switch (100%)
details: Green element lineups should counter Blue enemies and avoid Purple disadvantage paths.
Crow and Limiter Switch rewards make this trial valuable for long-term roster growth.

lucidBlocksAchievementTracker.title: All Star Tower Defense X Portals Guide from Tier 1 to Unbound
lucidBlocksAchievementTracker.subtitle: Follow the All Star Tower Defense X Portal route: buy a portal, clear tiers, manage lives, and push for Unbound special rewards.
lucidBlocksAchievementTracker.intro: All Star Tower Defense X Portals were introduced in Update 6 and are purchased from NPC Nakime near the Trials entrance. Each portal has 3 lives and disappears after three defeats. Portal runs use tier difficulty and modifiers, with the long-term route climbing from Tier 1 to Tier 5 and then chasing Unbound.

steps.title: All Star Tower Defense X Buy a Portal
steps.action: Purchase a portal from NPC Nakime near the Trials entrance.
steps.result: You receive a portal with 3 lives.

steps.title: All Star Tower Defense X Start at Tier 1
steps.action: Begin with the lowest portal difficulty and build consistency.
steps.details: Tier path: Tier 1 > Tier 2 > Tier 3 > Tier 4 > Tier 5 > Unbound.
steps.result: Tier 1 is easiest, while Unbound is the highest challenge.

steps.title: All Star Tower Defense X Clear with Modifiers
steps.action: Read active modifiers before locking your lineup.
steps.details: Portal modifiers can buff or debuff elements similar to Challenges.
steps.result: Element shifts can change which units are safest for each run.

steps.title: All Star Tower Defense X Upgrade the Portal
steps.action: Complete a portal run to roll the next tier result.
steps.details: Before Tier 5, clears have 90% chance to upgrade and 10% chance to stay same tier.
steps.result: Most successful clears move upward until Tier 5.

steps.title: All Star Tower Defense X Protect Your 3 Lives
steps.action: Avoid repeated failed attempts on the same portal.
steps.details: Each portal has 3 lives and disappears after three defeats.
steps.result: A failed streak forces a restart with a new purchased portal.

steps.title: All Star Tower Defense X Farm Tier 5 for Unbound
steps.action: Keep clearing Tier 5 portals after reaching Tier 5.
steps.extra: Each Tier 5 clear has a 2% chance to grant an Unbound Portal.
steps.result: Unbound portals are the rare high-end target for portal progression.

steps.title: All Star Tower Defense X Claim Portal Rewards
steps.action: Clear portals for base rewards and Unbound unit goals.
steps.details: Base clear reward is 235 Gems and 25 Gold.
steps.extra: Frost Moon Unbound Portal grants Frost Moon; Patternine Unbound Portal grants Patternine.
steps.result: Portal farming combines steady currency with rare late-game unit targets.

lucidBlocksSingleplayerAndPlatformFAQ.title: All Star Tower Defense X Elements Counters, Damage Multipliers, and Unit Examples
lucidBlocksSingleplayerAndPlatformFAQ.subtitle: Use the All Star Tower Defense X element chart to pick counters before Story, Endless, Trials, and modifier-heavy Portal runs.
lucidBlocksSingleplayerAndPlatformFAQ.intro: In All Star Tower Defense X, element advantage deals 2x damage while element disadvantage deals 0.25x damage. Matching elements, neutral enemies, no-element enemies, and unrelated element pairs use standard damage.

lucidBlocksSteamDeckAndController.title: All Star Tower Defense X Hidden Potential
lucidBlocksSteamDeckAndController.intro: All Star Tower Defense X Hidden Potential upgrades are a major late-game system for scaling top units beyond base stats and traits.

faqs.question: What is All Star Tower Defense X Hidden Potential used for?
faqs.answer: All Star Tower Defense X Hidden Potential unlocks additional stat growth and performance boosts for high-value units.

faqs.question: Which All Star Tower Defense X units should get Hidden Potential first?
faqs.answer: In All Star Tower Defense X, prioritize your main carry and your most-used support unit before investing in secondary options.

faqs.question: How does All Star Tower Defense X Hidden Potential work with traits?
faqs.answer: All Star Tower Defense X traits and Hidden Potential stack together, so strong trait rolls gain even more value after node upgrades.

faqs.question: When should I reset All Star Tower Defense X Hidden Potential with Roka Fruit?
faqs.answer: Use resets in All Star Tower Defense X when a build path no longer matches your team role, and preserve progress on key nodes.

faqs.question: Is All Star Tower Defense X Hidden Potential worth early resources?
faqs.answer: For All Star Tower Defense X, it is usually best after your core roster is stable, then invest to push higher-tier modes.

lucidBlocksSettingsAndAccessibility.title: All Star Tower Defense X Items
lucidBlocksSettingsAndAccessibility.intro: All Star Tower Defense X item management is central to progression, especially for summon currency, reroll tools, and long-session farming resources.

settings.name: All Star Tower Defense X Gems
settings.description: Gems are the core All Star Tower Defense X summon currency and should be budgeted around target banners and pity goals.

settings.name: All Star Tower Defense X Trait Burners
settings.description: All Star Tower Defense X Trait Burners are consumed per reroll, so reserve bulk usage for long-term carry units.

settings.name: All Star Tower Defense X Stat Dice
settings.description: All Star Tower Defense X Stat Dice are best used when your core team is set and you need targeted stat improvements.

settings.name: All Star Tower Defense X Bounded Cubes
settings.description: All Star Tower Defense X Bounded Cubes are strong mid-to-late progression items that should be aligned with upgrade timing.

settings.name: All Star Tower Defense X Roka Fruit
settings.description: All Star Tower Defense X Roka Fruit supports Hidden Potential reset planning and should be saved for major build pivots.

lucidBlocksUpdatesAndPatchNotes.intro: Track All Star Tower Defense X patch notes, event rewards, and roster-impact changes so your summons and upgrades stay aligned with the current meta.

entries.title: All Star Tower Defense X Banner and Meta Rotation

faq.title: All Star Tower Defense X
faq.subtitle: Key questions players ask before building teams in All Star Tower Defense X

questions.question: How do I redeem codes in All Star Tower Defense X?
questions.answer: In All Star Tower Defense X, open the game lobby, tap the bird icon, paste an active code, and press Redeem to claim rewards.

questions.question: What is the best beginner route in All Star Tower Defense X?
questions.answer: For All Star Tower Defense X, redeem codes first, summon around banner timing, then clear Story Mode for stable progression rewards.

questions.question: How does pity work in All Star Tower Defense X summons?
questions.answer: All Star Tower Defense X summon pity guarantees a 5 Star after 100 pulls, and Unbound pity is tracked toward 2,000 pulls.

questions.question: Which resources matter most in All Star Tower Defense X?
questions.answer: The most important All Star Tower Defense X resources are Gems for summons, Trait Burners for rerolls, and upgrade materials for core units.

questions.question: Which modes should I farm after Story Mode in All Star Tower Defense X?
questions.answer: After Story in All Star Tower Defense X, focus on Infinite, Trials, and Portals based on your current roster strength and reward targets.

questions.question: How should I spend upgrades in All Star Tower Defense X?
questions.answer: In All Star Tower Defense X, prioritize one carry plus key support units, then invest traits and hidden potential into those core picks.
